zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronell de Ferrers於大約1175年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby40歲，母親Sybil de Braose42歲。她於1212年9月29日與Hervey de Stafford II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1237年5月12日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德 聖 查德享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronell de Ferrers于大约1175年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby40岁，母亲Sybil de Braose42岁。她于1212年9月29日与Hervey de Stafford II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1237年5月12日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德 聖 查德享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾史東。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Petronell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Petronilla, originally a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Petronius (of uncertain derivation). The name Petronilla was borne by a 1st-century martyr, and early in the Christian era came to be connected with Peter , so that in many legends surrounding her she is described as a companion or even the daughter of St Peter .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronell de Ferrers was born about 1175, in Derbyshire, England, her father, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, was 40 and her mother, Sybil de Braose, was 42. She married Hervey de Stafford II on 29 September 1212. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 12 May 1237, in Stafford St Chad, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronell de Ferrers est née environ 1175, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Braose, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Hervey de Stafford II le 29 septembre 1212. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1237, à Stafford St Chad, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronell de Ferrers um 1175 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby 40 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Braose 42. Sie hat am 29. September 1212 Hervey de Stafford II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1237 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Stafford St Chad, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Hervey de Stafford II il 29 settembre 1212. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Petronell de Ferrersが約1175年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derbyは40歳，母Sybil de Braoseは42歳であった。1212年9月29日にHervey de Stafford IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1237年5月12日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォード スト チャドで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Stafford Castle, Stafford, Staffordshire: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 채드
ko.lifeSummary: Petronell de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Braose(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1212년 9월 29일 Hervey de Stafford II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 채드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronell de Ferrers nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Braose, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Hervey de Stafford II em 29 de setembro de 1212. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1237, em Stafford St Chad, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stafford Castle, Stafford, Staffordshire: стаффорд ст чэд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronell de Ferrers родилась около 1175 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Braose, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hervey de Stafford II 29 сентября 1212 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 12 мая 1237 г. в местности стаффорд ст чэд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
